entities.name: deduplicate_meetings.py
entities.context: Python script at N5/scripts/ for identifying and removing duplicate meeting files

entities.name: Safety Checks
entities.context: Pre-deletion verification principles: verify content match, ensure canonical is readable, never delete singles, flag suspicious cases

entities.name: Semantic duplicates
entities.context: Files that represent the same meeting despite different names or timestamps

entities.name: Canonical filename
entities.context: The most authoritative/preferred filename to preserve when deduplicating

entities.name: Dry-run
entities.context: Testing mode that shows what would be deleted without executing

entities.name: Drive ingestion
entities.context: Process for downloading files from Google Drive

entities.name: Inbox
entities.context: Directory at Personal/Meetings/Inbox used for staging meeting files

entities.name: Batch processing
entities.context: Bulk operation on meeting files that benefits from prior deduplication

relationships.context: Script implements safety checks before recommending deletions
Script's core purpose is catching semantic duplicates with high recall
Script preserves most canonical filename during deduplication
Script supports --dry-run flag for safe testing
Primary target directory for scanning duplicates
Deduplication runs after Drive ingestion to clean newly downloaded files
Clean Inbox with deduplication before batch processing
